'''âj-zh-h''' ('''kajazhah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immune|immune]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immune|immune]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-zh-h
|-
! Lemma
| kajazhah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijazhah|thijazhah]] || [[word:jijazhah|jijazhah]] || [[word:shijazhah|shijazhah]] || [[word:kijazhah|kijazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujazhah|thuthujazhah]] || [[word:jujujazhah|jujujazhah]] || [[word:shushujazhah|shushujazhah]] || [[word:kukujazhah|kukujazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujazhah|thujazhah]] || [[word:jujazhah|jujazhah]] || [[word:shujazhah|shujazhah]] || [[word:kujazhah|kujazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujazhah|thujazhah]] || [[word:jujazhah|jujazhah]] || [[word:shujazhah|shujazhah]] || [[word:kujazhah|kujazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejazhah|thejazhah]] || [[word:jejazhah|jejazhah]] || [[word:shejazhah|shejazhah]] || [[word:kejazhah|kejazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojazhah|thothojazhah]] || [[word:jojojazhah|jojojazhah]] || [[word:shoshojazhah|shoshojazhah]] || [[word:kokojazhah|kokojazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojazhah|thojazhah]] || [[word:jojazhah|jojazhah]] || [[word:shojazhah|shojazhah]] || [[word:kojazhah|kojazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojazhah|thojazhah]] || [[word:jojazhah|jojazhah]] || [[word:shojazhah|shojazhah]] || [[word:kojazhah|kojazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjazhah|thĂŠjazhah]] || [[word:jĂŠjazhah|jĂŠjazhah]] || [[word:shĂŠjazhah|shĂŠjazhah]] || [[word:kĂŠjazhah|kĂŠjazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajazhah|thathajazhah]] || [[word:jajajazhah|jajajazhah]] || [[word:shashajazhah|shashajazhah]] || [[word:kakajazhah|kakajazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajazhah|thajazhah]] || [[word:jajazhah|jajazhah]] || [[word:shajazhah|shajazhah]] || [[word:kajazhah|kajazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajazhah|thajazhah]] || [[word:jajazhah|jajazhah]] || [[word:shajazhah|shajazhah]] || [[word:kajazhah|kajazhah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajazhah|shajazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajazhah|goshajazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajazhah|gokishajazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajazhahnĂŒ|shajazhahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhahnknĂŒ|goshajazhahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhahnĂŒ|gokishajazhahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajazhahshĂ«|shajazhahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkshĂ«|goshajazhahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajazhahshĂ«|gokishajazhahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhahro|shajazhahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkro|goshajazhahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhahro|gokishajazhahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhahmu|shajazhahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkmu|goshajazhahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhahmu|gokishajazhahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajazhahsher|shajazhahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajazhahnksher|goshajazhahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajazhahsher|gokishajazhahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajazhahng|shajazhahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkng|goshajazhahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajazhahng|gokishajazhahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajazhahya|shajazhahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkya|goshajazhahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajazhahya|gokishajazhahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajazhahyam|shajazhahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkyam|goshajazhahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajazhahyam|gokishajazhahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhahnĂŒshĂ«|shajazhahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajazhahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajazhahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhahnĂŒro|shajazhahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhahnknĂŒro|goshajazhahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhahnĂŒro|gokishajazhahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhahnĂŒmu|shajazhahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhahnknĂŒmu|goshajazhahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhahnĂŒmu|gokishajazhahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhahshĂ«nĂŒ|shajazhahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajazhahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajazhahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhahshĂ«ro|shajazhahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkshĂ«ro|goshajazhahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhahshĂ«ro|gokishajazhahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhahshĂ«mu|shajazhahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkshĂ«mu|goshajazhahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhahshĂ«mu|gokishajazhahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhahronĂŒ|shajazhahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkronĂŒ|goshajazhahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhahronĂŒ|gokishajazhahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhahroshĂ«|shajazhahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkroshĂ«|goshajazhahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhahroshĂ«|gokishajazhahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhahromu|shajazhahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkromu|goshajazhahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhahromu|gokishajazhahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhahmunĂŒ|shajazhahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkmunĂŒ|goshajazhahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhahmunĂŒ|gokishajazhahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhahmushĂ«|shajazhahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkmushĂ«|goshajazhahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhahmushĂ«|gokishajazhahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhahmuro|shajazhahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhahnkmuro|goshajazhahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhahmuro|gokishajazhahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
